mapper.insert: INSERT INTO text_version_history (text_id, version, diff_title, diff_content, change_summary) VALUES (#{textId}, #{version}, #{diffTitle}, #{diffContent}, #{changeSummary})
mapper.select: SELECT id, text_id as textId, version, diff_title as diffTitle, diff_content as diffContent, change_summary as changeSummary, create_time as createTime, deleted FROM text_version_history WHERE text_id = #{textId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY version DESC

SELECT id, text_id as textId, version, diff_title as diffTitle, diff_content as diffContent, change_summary as changeSummary, create_time as createTime, deleted FROM text_version_history WHERE text_id = #{textId} AND version = #{version} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, text_id as textId, version, diff_title as diffTitle, diff_content as diffContent, change_summary as changeSummary, create_time as createTime, deleted FROM text_version_history WHERE text_id = #{textId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY version DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE text_version_history SET deleted = 1 WHERE text_id = #{textId} AND version = #{version} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE text_version_history SET version = version - 1 WHERE text_id = #{textId} AND version > #{version} AND deleted = 0
